title: Carrier Global Stock One of the Best to Own in June
text: Carrier Global Corp (NYSE:CARR) has been middling above the $37 level for the past month -- struggling to rally from its April 28 annual low of $36.23.

title: Carrier Global Corporation (CARR) Presents at Wolfe Global Transportation and Industrials Conference (Transcript)
text: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE:CARR ) Wolfe Global Transportation and Industrials Conference Call May 24, 2022 9:10 AM ET Company Participants Patrick Goris - Chief Financial Officer Sam Pearlstein - Head of Investor Relations Conference Call Participants Nigel Coe - Managing Director, Wolfe Research, LLC Question-and-Answer Session Q - Nigel Coe And very pleased to have CFO, Patrick Goris; and Head of Investor Relations, Sam Pearlstein with us. I don't think you've got open remarks, Patrick.

title: Carrier to Present at the Wolfe Global Transportation & Industrials Conference 2022
text: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. , May 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE:CARR) Senior Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Patrick Goris will speak at the Wolfe Global Transportation & Industrials Conference on Tuesday, May 24, 2022 at 9:10 a.m.

title: Carrier Global: Cooling Down From A Hot Bearish Market
text: Carrier Global reveals more opportunities, as the U.S.' decarbonization footprint shows only modest improvement. It benefits from a strong outlook for share repurchases and minimal operating impact from the conflict between Russia and Ukraine.
